name: StatusBadge
description: Compact status indicator for table rows and lists. Two styles (stroke/light), five statuses (completed/pending/failed/information/disabled), optional dot mode.

status.description: Semantic intent — drives icon/dot color and (in light style) text color

style.description: stroke = white bordered surface with neutral text; light = tinted surface with state-colored text

withDot.description: Replace the status icon with a small colored dot

accessibility.role: none (decorative label — wrap with aria-label where it conveys meaning not present in surrounding text)
